examples: This scarcity is inevitable in less developed countries.
Either food scarcity or excessive hunting can threaten a population of animals.
In the wild, these birds store food for retrieval later during periods of food scarcity.
Other oil companies did a better job of coping with the scarcity of new oilfields.
Even the good spectrum proposals, however, may be hampered by overly prescriptive rules based on scarcity.
